sms.body: Well I dated chicks before I came out, you know the whole pretending your not gay thing...so it could have worked
My biweekly court check-in is tomorrow at 11am just fyi

Just last thing I'm going to say, maybe 10-15 years ago you could trust a cop. But these days its not about policing, its about making arrests, budgets and income for the city's. Cops are not honest people and are not on the peoples side. They are not as bad as ICE shooting people, but they aren't much better
They are going to want it all. Sorry I didn't see your text
I don't think that's how they work
Wondering if you can talk to lawyer and say you only need 2 hours now and may want to put him on retainer later
I usually have the cleaning lady do fridge when we're gone but havent
I was planning on it
Please throw away
Did you know you have a pound of butter that expired in 2022
I was gonna make a switch hitter joke but I know you dont swing both ways
We really need to go to a few games this year. I think I only saw 2 games last year
I'll have two balls and a bat
I dont watch the news so I guess ill se it on sports center
So idk up to you guys
In other words I didn't murder or have a high profile so hes done with us

Brad says higher a lawyer, but he is unavailable. I think he's politely saying I took your money when I was good lawyer but I'm too expensive now that im rated in the top 10 in Washington state for criminal defense
We're up and ready

Iâ€™m praying for you brother. I really want you to reach out to the lord and read the Bible, it can give you clarity in times like this. Donâ€™t overthink it just read it and pray. I will do the same for you today brother. In Jesus Christ name you will be sane and blessings may be upon you. In the lords name I pray AMEN.

Guys I'm telling you i think I'm mentally decompensating. And its pretty serious. My parents are even worried. After I got spooked I left my place and haven't been back since. I can't even open the front door without being drenched in sweat (more than I already am). So I just wanted you guys to know what's going on if you suddenly don't hear from me. Its because I'm either in jail or taking time to get my brain healthy. Just to much going on and I cant/don't know how to deal with it. You two are my 2 best work friends and good friends outside if work, even though we have only hung out like twice lol. But my group of friends i usually kick it with that have been coming over checking on me has already told me I lost my marbles. I just didn't want y'all to worry if you don't see or hear from me for bit or you see me on king 5 streaking across the baseball diamond opening day
Sounds like you are 100% overthinking bro. Just keep your head down and focus on yourself and Iâ€™m praying for you too brother!
Just relax dude
It is, it reminds me of going to my aunts ranch as a kid and staying there.
Sounds nice
They got a sick little farm in carnation with some horses and trails
Im taking a break right now, staying at buddies while they are gone and taking break from shit
Take a spa day bud

Barely at all, and I hope so, but the last few days have been really bad. My shrink told me its PTSD sympotom call hyper vigilance due to traumatic experience, I call it being trapped in a nightmare that doesn't ever end.
Maybe you should get an Airbnb cabin somewhere. I did that with my cousins a couple weekends ago in Gold Bar
How much are you sleeping?
I think your just stressed out.
Don't go spreading that around work lol. Just if you don't see or hear from me for a bit its because I check myself into a treatment center

Awe thanks...but srsly, I have such bad PTSD from my last encounter (I never told you guys everything that happened when I was arrested. You have to remember what the charges were, people accused of what I was don't get the 5 star treatment) that now when I see cops I totally freakout, this time idk, I feel like they are watching me, following me and going to pounce on me as soon as I step outside. I hate to say it guys, but I think I'm mentally unwinding.
I always do
Pray for me
I dont know what to say
I'm not even kidding, ever since last week when I saw a cop outside my apartments I've been losing my mind and its starting to scare me. Like no joke.
Damn dude
Or both
I think I am having a psychotic breakdown from everything going on or I'm being stalked by the police
I will. If it turns out to be nothing I'm going to go back to my shrink
Lets see what tomorrow brings. Get some sleep and have Alexa wake you up
Something in that field
I think you would be a good fit for jobs like procurement specialist, supply chain analysts or

Your cover letter and resume look good, I would just tailor your job descriptions a little more based on the job your applying for. On Boeing job postings there is a position responsibilities sections, kinda see how they word things and try and use their words. An example I used with my friend is the job posting says "Assist colleagues by answering questions and sharing information about work methods, processes and procedures" what you could put in your group health job description is something like "As part of my duties, I assisted my coworkers by sharing the latest processes and procedures to make sure my team stayed current on our operational methods", kinda regurgitate what the job posting is saying, that way you hit the keywords they are telling. They also like the job descriptions to be more of a narrative of what you did. Its the same with the interviews, they like the answers to be a story. They will ask things like "Tell me about a time you didn't meet a deadline and what did you learn." The response should; Tell the situation (While working at xyz I was part of a group helping reorganizing the 123 databases when our network went down) Then explain your task (My job was to gather all the files from 2012-20214 and do zzz with them) then your actions (Since we could not access the digital copies, I had to find the original paper copies and do the work manually and it took much longer than anticipated as I was not familiar with our filing systems.) Then the result (This caused me not to be able to finish my task on time and caused my team to finish our project late. After the project I took some extra time to better familiarize my self on backup procedures and shared them with the rest of my team so if the system went down again we would be better prepared and wouldn't fall behind.)
Wrong person
R u here?
Just let someone in
My buddy Brandon is coming over in about an hour to go over getting on at Boeing, if you wanna join us feel free. We are meeting at my parents, 222 bell street, unit 401, Edmonds 98020
Still waiting, his paralegal is gonna do some calling around then have brad look into it after morning court
Sometimes you may need to go downstairs and let people in.
What did you get from Brad
My buddy Brandon is coming over. He needs help getting a job at Boeing, but I also told him what's going on and that I need him to tell me if I have gone nuts, to
It's all good good morning
Just opened door
Our time or theres?
9am on the email from Ashley
No problem, just want to know
I'll have to look but I think its real early
What time is court tomorrow
Brads paralegel just called, he's looking into some things. I have a delivery coming
Sorry, I passed out hard yesterday
U ok
We are planning on coming to chill after the 10
Hey man how are you feeling
Did you want me to initiate the call or were you going to start it through meet?
That will be fine then
1 hour
That should be fine. How long do the appointments run?
yes Matt but itll be more like 3:30 if thats okâ€¦ im running over with other clientsâ€¦ im so sorry
Our appointment at 3 still work for you?
No worries. Donâ€™t have high expectations regarding it because itâ€™s nothing special ðŸ˜‚ðŸ˜‚ðŸ˜­
Sorry I haven't gotten back to you yet, I'm gonna look at your resume and cover letter tonight
Our next door neighbors didn't hear or see anything but they'll hear if something was up
I will
Let me know what you here from your neighbors still
Let us know how it goes after.
Its at 3pm
If you sleep make sure you wake up for your meeting today
Call me when your more awake...this whole thing has been driving me off a cliff so I call snoco this morning
Get some sleep
Incase something happens you will need this also
Absolutely bro
Its all good. Tomorrow?
Shit man we just got home
Oh shoot I just saw this
We get done with karaoke tonight about midnight and we can head your way
Love you. Good night
We're going to bed soon. You should too

Theres some new people that were moving in as we moved out if I have the right apt. The woman right across from elevator was moving out just after we left. I can check with neighbors tomorrow to see what was going on
I guest its the middle unit, yeah same side
Same side as ours?
Who lives on that side of the hall near the elevator? Is that the single man?
Its a single man. He's been being treated for cancer. He has a brother that lives in the area. Maybe he died?
2 down if you know them
Right next door?
Can you call your neighbor, just to check in? See what's up? Lots of people going in and out
No dogs allowed in apts but sometimes they visit
Nothing ATM, the people went in the apartment and never cane out. Does your neighbor have a dog, lab or retriever sized?
What's up
The fuck?? Sorry you guys are the only people I know from OK so thought I would ask. Some random number just texted me from OK asking if I wanted to go to dinner tomorrow night
No bro
Did you just text me from a text now Oklahoma number?
You know me. Ill be up
Okay, it wouldn't be until after 1 if tonight
OK, just let me know. I can give ya gas again if you need it
If not we can come hangout tomorrow
Potentially after our date night
Ah damn. Was gonna see if you could come keep me sane
No were going out
You guys at the hall?
I think they are at donnas? Two units down with the camera
It's the same two guys going from unit to unit
Why would you think that? Do you see anything concrete?
And me probably
Cameras on..
For what?
I think they are doing a unit by unit search
Please be calm. If they were caring out someone earlier they may need to come back
Here they come. I think it is them
Sorry what?
Here theybcome
Maybe, but like I said, I'm super careful because if you cross that line, its criminal and civil with charges like unregistered foreign agent, and it only gets worse from there so I am so careful

I talked to my shrink about it, just to make sure I wasn't going nuts. He said no, and my behavior may seem crazy, but its normal for someone reliving a extremely traumatic event. Its basically like soldiers waking up in the middle of the night thinking they are back in combat. For me its the fear of opening my eyes and I am back in that cell, forced to wear only this orange "safety" vest in a cell with nothing but a hole in the middle of the room, or being tackled to the ground telling them I'm not resisting I'm doing what you ask. Then they tell you to do something else, but you can't because you have a knee shoved into the back of your skull so they press harder. Then being called a liar about meds and denied mental health care and shoved into a cell around people who were screaming all night, banging on the walls. I'm sorry that might be hard to read, but that's only a little of my first 48 hours. And my shrink says I do need to talk about it more to not have this reaction to police
Oh ok maybe that could be it then
They were at my apartment

Well...not true, most people don't know this, and I don't advertise it, but I am a hacker. I am worried it could be related to that, but I am very careful to obey the laws. Just do shit for fun and on occasions I'll donate my time or computing power to help Ukraine hacking groups take down Russian sites. But I obey what were told we are allowed to do by the government and what we can't. Like I can do passive scans and such..basically recon...and pass the information on. I have to leave any of the real hacking to the guys in the Ukraine....there's this like 3000 page document that basically says...its illegal to actually do the hacking, but poking and finding holes isnt
I mean before today.
We understand. Just to clarify...did the police show up to your tegular apartment door looking for you or were they nearby and you were afraid they were after you?
Dude you don't do anything but work and go to meetings ðŸ™„
No clue, I'm sure its gonna be something really stupid
Yeah the comedy of it evaded me
Your not a local so might not be as funny to you for using him.
Ok cool man what could it be im super stumped

Ye. My shrink told me my reaction, while kinda off, is perfectly normal for someone with severe PTSD caused by last interaction with them and what I went through in jail. The attorney said not everything shows up online, but his PI was a Edmonds cop for 30 years. I'm using Bradly Johnson from 1800DUIAWAY
It's weird nothing is popping up via internet search
Hopefully you can get some answers
Oh shit ðŸ˜³
I got an attorney here in Edmonds that's gonna dig into it monday. Try and figure it out. They were back at my apartments when I went by yesterday
It's all good brother what's the good word
Sorry about the other night, I wasn't trying to snub you.

OK and I hope you guys know that I really have no clue why this kind of thing keeps happening. I'm really just going to work and then going straight home everyday, I've even been going to AA and run the Friday midnight meeting to make sure I don't end up drunk and trying to kill myself, spinning out of control. I love you both so much and I am sorry that everything always turns to shit.
I can't initiate record from here manually. These cameras work great for my use case but not for this one.
I've disarmed the mantle camera cause you're triggering it constantly. If something appears to be happening please text "rec" and I'll arm it. Then motion will trigger it.
The sun changed and is washing out the video
I sent a share link
Its scanning our condo
One sec
I got email verification but it says I need to scan qr code on camera
Cant get registered yet. Email verification not arriving.
We're trying
I'm at yours, but there is a hall camera I can link you into
Trying. Our apt or yours
Download the app Ubox and I'll share the camera in the hall
Davisonmk@gmail.com and randydavison@comcast.net
What are your emails
Absolutely not
They don't need to come in apt so you want to go downstairs and talk to tgem?
No, but the guy I talked today has a guybwhonused to be Edmonds pd
Any idea why?
(253) 867-2675 both lawyers are brads
What's brads number
Here is his cell +14252103466
Let us know what happens
Here is the number for a lawyer I talked to today 425-776-5547
Just be polite if so. Maybe they're just serving you
Here at our apt?
I think the police are here
Just opened door for delivery
Did you get any sleep?
Dad's not up yet. Nothing from Brad?
When you wake up lets get money and rent out of the way. $2600 is what I'll need this month
You can check dad's closet and left hand drawers in case there's something that fits. Won't fit dad now he's lost a lot of weight
My clothes are in the wash and I don't have extra,
They came up
I did. You can open door though but I let them in
No, I can't just buzz them pls
You can also go down and let them in
They're there. Just let them in
Verify its doordash though
There's gonna be a call to be let up in about 20 mins just fyi

It has a built in LLM that will hack and security harden a system, as well as fully automate any metasploit module. It will find ways to deploy payloads to infect systems with a reverse shell. Its pretty bad ass
Looks cool
This is what my apps web dashboard looks like
No, sorry was sleeoing
Understand both
Any updates
Yes, and still waiting...only thing I don't like about brad. My shrink changed my appointment to telle health and reaffirmed I have severe PTSD from last time
Still scared
Hey hru today
Hi, Matthew! Thank you for choosing LifeStance Health. Could you please leave us a review using the link below?
Was it Brad? Glad you're back in control of situation.
Sounds good
Attorney says to stay out and wait to here back. Doesn't want what happened last time and wants control if something is happening
Yes, they're good about going after what they think is a live one. When I threatened to sue them if they ever came back, they quit. But you do need to find out why
I was thinking that too, they did used to try and blame me for everything
Maybe it's just harassment. Start with Brad. Sorry
Yeah, I know I will work on brad. Yes. From all the warrant databases and everything that's available for public plus even paid the $11 dollars for WSP's online database, there's nothing
So you have to find out why

If you really need to find one wait until neighbor is awake. He used to be one. May know someone that can call for you but I'd start with old attorney. We've paid him 30 thousand and he really only worked one day
I love you guys and yea I was going to start with brad and yes. They did
The old attorney you had would probably at least make a call for you. Did they show up again?

Just never mind. I love you guys. I think I'm going to have to call an attorney this morning, hopefully I can find one that will figure this out for cheap or I'm going to end up in a straight jacket. I hate to say it, but I might be losing my mind.
Tell your neighbors not to open the apartment for anyone and not to offer up they have a key
No problem homie
Thanks again guys
Yea no cops anywhere
OK thanks for checking, and I assume no popo sitting anywhere?
No card or anything
In the middle
Its a bottom floor apart in the first building
Bottom or top
I'll be at the front door in a second sorry
222 Bell street, Edmonds 98020
Hey, what are you doing? I need some help
OK, come on up
We're back
Ok sounds good
Smoke shop is still open 9794 Edmonds Way, Edmonds, WA 98020, also you should come up for a few when you get back and I can fill you on everything that's going on. If you don't have to race home
Camel blues
Gotcha, didn't see anything, GPS says 6 mins
But good
OK that little ally way is where they were before, and its a great place to hide from view
I don't see anyone
OK, I was going to suggest that. Make sure eyeball up the middle drive between the row of garages, its where whoever was watching was.
Running by your place first
On my way to ya
I'll have to look at that
Looks pretty good. Gauletslayer edition is pretty badass also
Nice, I'll check it out
They also remastered the old one
Even has dlc
You should try that new Commandos. It's pretty challenging
Anyway I can help you
No problem buddy
OK, I really appreciate you
Ill be there about 1115
I get ya homie

OK, just a pack and another run by my apartment. I'll give you another 40. I know I'm probably over reacting to nothing, but you have no clue how traumatized I was after my last run in with Edmonds finest.
My bank is overdrawn
After the 10
I can bring you a few packs or whatever just need money
No worries
Its just me over here. If you do come by I could use some smokes
OK, no worries
Ok we may im not sure
Yeah, thanks for helping yesterday. And sorry for having to help out. Lol
Still hol'd up if you guys wanna come by. Still don't know much
Hey bro how are you doing
Well that's good

Nothing to do with the case in Kansas, so that's a good, and I can't find anything in the Washington state court website except my ticket I paid in Nov. So idk. I'm gonna call my attorney up here and make sure the extradition case he handled for me last year was fully taken care of, make sure everything got filed that needed to be.
Everything ok today?
One day is fine and mom and I do understand your trauma. We were closely involved, remember? We're still traumatized too.

I'm trying. But I think I need a day to regain my feet. I already made an appointment with my shrink for tomorrow before work. I don't think you understand how traumatic that was for me last time. I'm still shaking. I have benefits, and the policy at work is as long as you have benefits and your caught up, they don't care. If you get behind, that's what we have Saturday for. This isn't your era where calling out sick penalizes you. They really don't care. I have to use my 47 hours of vacation and 34 hours of sick leave before my roll overdate or I lose it. Plus I'm still accruing another 40 hours. I need today to just be somewhere else. Please don't fight me on this. Its one day
Ashley says there's no warrant active in Kansas so if the cops do contact you you can tell them the story about last time and push them to check. We assume you're talking to Ashley too.
Okay, maybe they just wanted information? So go to work and forget about it? I'd be traumatized too but hopefully its nothing
That's good, and I didn't bring my car. Uber from here to there is cheap
Probably need to move your car too
So Ashley said it's not coming from Kansas so you're going to have to contact Edmonds police or have someone do it on your behalf. Police didn't leave anything?
I don't have a buzzer key
You gotta come up to the door
OK, give me a second
We're here
OK, text when your at the door and I'll come down. Make sure its the bell street entrance
GPS says 15 minutes
We can meet you
Or if you meet me at 222 bell street, Edmonds I can give you $30 cash

Yeah, idk what's going on. OK, let me see what I have, and if my cash app is working, does your bank have zelle built-in? If not you should look at getting a chase second chance account. Its basically a prepaid account with all the chase features. Only sucky part is it cost $8 a month. But the zelle access is worth it. You got PayPal?
Heading home from the meeting
When you can
Usually they will show up in marked units to serve normal warrants

There's a house key in the left hand drawer of the table as you come in. Go to work tomorrow. You'll need to move your car in the morning since I dont think handicapped placard is there. Let us know when you hear from Ashley. We're going to bed.
Hmm might have been ice for illegals
Ok cool
No, it wasn't and let me see what I have, I might be able to only do $25. I'm on my way to where I'm crashing, once I'm set up I'll text. Be Luke 10 mins
Low on gas and food
Or whatever you can afford
Can you send me 50 and ill get it back to you the 3rd
Idk man pretty weird was it marked units
Yeah, for now at least. Not sure who that was staking out my house
Cool brother everything ok
I just got my phone back
Hey man what's up
I have not
Cool. I just stopped at Walmart on 164th. I can grab a ps controller. Have you played the new Commandos yet?
Oh if you haven't left yet, bring a Xbox or PS controller
Maybe sooner depending on traffic, just gotta get gas
Just packing up, should be home in 30-45 mins
Cool. I'll start slowly making my way
Gonna be heading out soon. I'll let you know when I'm on my way home
Not much, gotta run into work till about 630, then I'll be free
Will be mine again when I'm back, I'm waiting for all move notices become null before returning from loa
Let tom know if I can know if I'll be selected for move crew or not will help my recovery. I know he's still a weekout at the earliest form his surgery, but ifvyou talk to him
No, in dieshay's area. The position ahead of mine
Ohh good. Iâ€™m guessing that lady isnâ€™t in your area then
I have great leads
They think he is cocky. I know a few leads like that, but they all work aft bodies

Sorry fellas. My lead is honestly the best lead Iâ€™ve had my entire life. Dude works on the airplane can get almost every IP done in half the time and is always helping. Youâ€™ll never find him at his desk. Wish you guys had someone like that aswell.
They don't like him
I have 0 faith in people from CI&R, they're lazy and they make things worse because they dont know the build or the jobs
Dieshay says he want to go to erd shift now, because he wanted the spot but they didn't even ask
She was lead out in CI&R, she does know a few thing's
Dang thatâ€™s sad. The lead should be the best guy on the team
She knows whats shes doing
I mean doubt she is*
She had flick the qa manager wrapped around her finger
Yeah, and she blamed me for a lot of it on one of the planes. No doubt, and no doubt she isn't playing nick
I think its because nick has a crush on her
A&P and still effs stuff up and is lead? Love this company
I wouldn't let her touch me
All I know is, she fucks a lot of things up, especially the lap
Just like our jakie poo...if she wasnt a lezbo I'd say they should hookup
Ill send it.
Sounds like a badass
Caitlin, and she's an A&P
Oh, I'm tired af
He said white girl not girl with white hair lol

Can dad send me $200? I overestimated on what I could send back, but now I know what I can afford to cut going forward. I'll have a new budget for you today or tomorrow, and I should be be able to wind down a little more every month.
What girl with white hair?
Bald nick is a temp manager now and he made that fat white girl that does nothing a temp team leas
Ok sounds good
I'd be leaving from uberbeatz
Let's do tomorrow, give me some time to clean after work, and I might just take the day off
I'm meeting Will at 7 and would be done by 930 tonight. I can head down there afterwards unless tomorrow is better for you
I can leave work around 6:30 or 7 either night.
No plans. Meeting up with Will at 7 to jam for a bit. Then nothing. Nothing tomorrow either
What are you doing tonight or tomorrow?
OK, I'm down. I'll figure out when I can get out of work early and I'll hit you up. And Happy Birthday
I'm off this week for my bday and going to Canada Thursday if you want to kick it at all this week
Next Sunday? I'm not feeling too hot
I can meet up with you any day before work. I start at 2:30, so any morning would work
No worries
Just waking up sorry
What's up?
I would love to, but tomorrow Iâ€™m helping my friend clear out her Dadâ€™s stuff his house who passed away recently. If another day works for you let me know please
3 round TKO
Dang I totally missed it
What a fight

I feel it, I do that with sears lol. But if you want, I'm helping a buddy get a job there also, we are meeting at noon tomorrow at the ed-lynn fellowship hall to go over their interview style and stuff if you wanna join us. We are gonna do the noon meeting then get some grub and go over everything
perfect â€¦ sorry about today
Lets schedule for the Sunday at 3 my time

Ill tell you what I have so maybe we can fit something togetherâ€¦.i have friday 2/27 at 4:00 (2:00 your time)Sunday 3/1 at 5:00 (3:00 your time) or 3/7 Saturday at 11:00 or 12:00 (9:00 or 10:00 am your time) .. any of those work?
During the week is extremely hard due to my work schedule, but I can probably make something work, can I let you know Monday after I see what my load looks like
Hi matt Im sorry about today I had an emergency today and couldnt connect with you.. I apologizeâ€¦. can we meet sometime this week?

This is Matthew Davison, Ashley's client. Not sure if there's tech issues but I havnt gotten a meet notification and nothing seems to be happening on my end, or if we got time zones screwed up...but since for whatever reason we were unable to connect, should we reschedule for an earlier time next weekend? I can use a day of sick time to take next Saturday off, and if we schedule earlier give us time to work out kinks, since I know your 2 hours ahead, so almost 5pm there for you
Nope she still doesnt care
Stopped for an energy drink. Your landlord isn't going to care I parked in the post office garage right? She still doesn't care?
You must have got in
Okay thanks. I'll call in a bit
Next door neighbor is opening
This is for something else Ashley wants me to do
Okay so he's testing again?
I need the apartment again at about 2
Great point. Thanks
I don't blame you, it will be faster, but I'd be careful they don't say oh, used your own insurance? You have to pay us back. I'd talk to our insurance guy before doing that.
Yeah I'm probably going to end up just using my insurance instead of fighting them.
No worries, that sucks the IME was fucked. Was hoping you would get some good news
I was thinking about it. But I have to get up early. I'm just going to grab something to eat and go to Kristinas. Sorry man. IME was fucked as expected.
You coming by the hall?
Ah that's right
Working till 6 am
You should come to the 10 if you can
I sent you my resume and cover letter. I smudged it saying I worked at group health longer than I did, but they canâ€™t really check that because the company no longer exists haha. Thanks
Ok cool been missing ya
Let me check how much money I have
Dennys afterwords I can pay you back for mine and Ashley's tomorrow as soon as my check clear
Hey man haven't heard from you in a while you ok
What's going on Matt?
Thanks, Iâ€™ll look that up and email you tonight!
Will do
It's cool call me back if ya got a min
Sorry got a new phone
Not much trying to talk to you lol
Oh shit sup
It's Brandon you jackwagon
Who did ?
Who did?
Also if you havent looked up the STAR method, I would. Its how Boeing does their hiring process
Things been OK. Yeah you can email me resume and cover letter, mbdavison8@gmail.com, I put my references on my resume its self.

Things are okay with me. How is life treating you? Yes, I can definitely use some help ahaha. Iâ€™ve been applying for jobs like crazy for the last few months! Do you want me to send you my cover letter and resume? Every time Iâ€™ve filled out a job application for Boeing they havenâ€™t asked for references

Hey Brady, its your cousin Matt. I've been meaning to touch base with you, how's life been? Also, I hear you have been applying at Boeing. If you want I can help you with your resume and see if the referral program is active right now or not. If it is, the person applying almost always get the job you apply for if its on the list. Just let me know!
Hope you ate
Thats the rumor
Idk why,?
Are you transferring to my shop?
Fingers crossed

OK, I never heard back after the test. The guy said he would send the results at the end of the day. With the time difference might not hear until tomorrow. Only thing the guy said after the test was I hope this helps your case, but idk if that means anything
Brady is 425 326 6955 He said he has no message from Matt so they both need wrong numbers

I rescheduled for tomorrow, and it looks like I will need that $900 until at least Thursday. I have a flat tire, I'll have to see if my tire will hold air long enough after work to drive or not, but I will have to drop my car off at les Schwab before my appointment or on my way home and uber, and yes I still have the $750. But I will pay the cost of the tires back if its non-repairable, and if it is I'll send it back. My only other option is to try and use one of the high cost credit/payment plans they offer. I know you guys are mad at me for missing Sunday, but I don't want to fight right now and I don't want you giving up on me. I already feel like a loser for asking for help

Ill be on a LOA for a few weeks, but id stay away from the waveyness tag, I filed a speak up about that and a few other issues, namely that every request Ive made since my restrictions came off has gone unawnsered, and a few other issue. Also a peice of advice, always have your outlook set to send read and delivery recipts. One can be rejected by the sender, the other cant, and it can cover your butt.

You might want to let QA know that we reported that fod in STA 888 to our lead as soon as it was found. That we did not delay in reporting or try to hide it, just tell them the truth. That we just didn't see it when we put it together since the job was picked up from first shift and you were only helping out, the job was mine. I'd also grab a Union steward. Can't say more
We were thinking mid day or later. If you canâ€™t we understand
Give him another day.
I txted Brady yesterday morning and never head back
Not even close, but what's new
You good bro?
OK thank you and sorry
OK. I'll send 150.
Everything is good down here, he's working on the blend right now. As soon as he is done he is gonna put it up for u/s and reconvene
But that $150 should the last I'll need, that's $600 less then before

Can dad send me another $150? Sorry as I am adjusting to try and figure out the new budget I realized I forgot to include my car tabs this month. My next check later this week should have my bonus. Not sure how much it will be though
Woah, that's crazy

Lol, guess it didn't. I accidentally started calling you
Idk if that call dialed if it did sorry
Sorry I didn't get back you sooner, been crazy at work. I'll have to see if I can make Sunday morning work, what time would you be in the area?

No problem. Im in no hurry
Just on my way home. Traffic is pretty bad due to rain.
I am gonna take off
OK I will call in a second, in the factory.
Yes, Sunday at 3:00. Call me right now. I forgot whether I gave you last minute instructions
I called and left a message, we are still good for Sunday? You got Ashley to review the questions?

I don't see anything at the tube, I just stopped by after talking to that LE about a tag
How ya holding
Hey brotha
Let me know if we could come up maybe to your moms and you could
Sunday at 3:00 pm is a go. Call me sometime today and confirm
I meant to include that you can call tonight up to 1:00 am.
No problems! Call me any time tonight when youâ€™ve got time. Ian usually up till 1:00 or 2:00. I left a voicemail on your phone
In after lunch meeting
perfectâ€¦. ill see you on 2/21!
Brady is my middle name in case you are wondering on the name difference
Yes I do have google Meet
do you have google meet?
I don't have apple so I can only do Face time via a weblink
perfectâ€¦ face time?
That's works for me
i can do 2:30 your time on 2/21 Saturday
Next Saturday will be my off weekend

This is Matthew Davison, my Attorney is Ashley Repp, sorry it took me a bit to get back to you. I had to talk with my attorney about a few things and then figure out my OT schedule at work. (I am 2 hours behind you guys by the way). It has made scheduling things a bit complicated. I work 2nd shift at Boeing so my hours are 2:30pm PT to 11:00PM PT Mon - Fri, but recently we have been on mandatory weekends. I don't know how long each appointment is, but because of the OT, either early morning (for me) Saturdays or if your available, Sundays would work.
I get that.
Yeah we used it last year when we went to a few games, itâ€™s so much better Iâ€™d just need my car just in case anything happens
Well, not really free. But yeah. If you have never taken the train, you should some time. Its fun. Picks up in everett, mukilteo and Edmonds.
Go for free
Yeah, I have an orca card
Yeah I wouldn't drink, I'd also probably take the train or light rail. They will have the sounder running for opening weekend, its like 6 bucks
No, ill check

Did you check on like Craig's list for people selling their season tickets? There are a lot of people who buy the home game full season, and then keep one game per series and sell the rest. Used to be able to get "seasons pass" for pretty cheap
Ok, I dont think any of us really drink anymore
I remember when M's tickets were $15 dollars for the 300 level just above the 3rd base line in the kingdom. Best seats for catching foul balls and great view
Id buy season tickets next year
If I go I wonâ€™t be able to drink and Iâ€™ll probably have to drive separately because the wife is getting close to giving birth around that time
Took my dad there
I looked because thats where I sat at a game last year and didnt see any. If you find some its 100% worth it
Section 243's not bad. Any club level tickets available? Just wondering
I look at getting season tickets but its too much and too late
Who are we playing against?
I'm down
Opening day weekend, yall wanna go
Thanks Matt
He will follow your instructions and see if it helps. He is getting a new phones tomorrow and will go to AT&T and have them take care of his phone
If you do go to best buy, tell them you need a system restore because he may have been infected with a virus, or see if one of the grandkids can help him do that. System restore is pretty simple

Yes, I can help, but the earliest would be this weekend because of my work schedule. Best thing to do if he hasn't already is change all his passwords, uninstall any app on his phone that isn't necessary and if he still has access to his email, see if he had clicked a link in his email that looked like it came from his bank . Right now there are a lot of people getting emails that look completely official, even have an official bank email that are fake and that's how people are getting access. It might be worth going to best buys geek squad counter and have them take a look since I might not be free until Sunday depending on if we have to work Saturday or not. On another note for his pictures, I have not forgotten, I just need to find my hard drive adapter to hook his old drive up to my computer.
Matt Mikes been hacked and we think it might be his computer. Any chance you could by tomorrow sometime and help us or we could meet at your folks apt with his computer
I bet, the news said to stay away from seatac to Seattle today
That's what she said
How you been?

Their going. Mostly just a waiting game now until the polygraph. Other than that just been working. Lots of OT, this week is the first week we havnt been designated, and I thinks that's in part because we had a death last week in my work area. The guy collapsed, hit his head hard. CPR was performed, but we found out as we were searching, they took all the AEDs out of the part of the factory we work in
Hows things going?
Good times are coming
Hell yeah
Geoff Moody is back as my manager
Better make it $50

Can dad send me $30, I'm still adjusting to the new budget. I get the 1100 tomorrow night, just will need to get gas tonight. I'm still bellow the 2800 I still won't need the extra $900. (Excluding court stuff)
I'll do that right now
Good idea. Now, you need to ask your attorney to call me tomorrow..
That would also make sure you and Ashley connect
We can do that. Let's do next Tuesday so we don't have guess and rush this.
We can plan for tomorrow, and if some reason my work won't let me out, I can let you know this evening. How much cash should I bring?
I would know by about 6pm, I would have to talk with my manager and then get my sr manager to OK me missing time

How long are the appointments? I was hoping to schedule something for a weekend, during the week is pretty difficult for me unless its early in the morning or if I a have a few more days notice. I can try and make tomorrow work, but it will depend on whether I can get the day off approved.
Do you want to schedule an appt for tomorrow at 12:30pm?

I can't tonight. I texted Ray hoping he would cover. But I have a super early court thing tomorrow I have to do and today we had a guy drop dead. While we weren't really friend-friends, just work friends, I still can't get the image out of my head of seeing him down
You coming to chair the meeting
Hey, if your at the hall can you run my midnight tonight? I got an appointment in the early am tomorrow and after the day today I just wanna crash out
Yeah, death sucks that way. Is anyone actually working on fwd bodies
Its pretty somber here
He wasn't like a friend-friend, more of a work friend. Thanks though.
What a great man, sorry you lost a friend buddy. Iâ€™m here if you need anything.

He was also in the middle of renovation at his home to have things he always wanted installed. Before joining Boeing, he served in the US Navy working Machine shop, was in operation desert storm and began his career at Boeing in 1990's on 747. He had a great sense of humor, even if it was a bit maudlin at times. And even though he could be grouchy, when you needed help, he was always there to lend a hand.
Len, been with the company for a long time. Had a wife and 2 daughters. He was gonna retire at the end of the year too
Thatâ€™s so dangerous what the heck
We told ED our union steward that we are gonna "pull the pol-19 red card" and stop production if they don't take our concerns serious over safety equipment
Like with how no one could find the emergency number for Arnie yesterday, we couldn't find a single fucking AED. They took them out of the shop.
Gosh dang man im praying for his family and you guys. Sorry that happened matt.
Yeah. He was a mess
I feel bad for Taylor

Holy crap no way
I hear he fell
Someone die????
I'm taking the rest of the day off
It sucks. Len was pretty cool guy. I feel bad for Taylor, he did the CPR until the medics arrived
Everything all good?
I heard what happened
How you doing Matt?
He walked up to the barge and just collapsed right where AJ sits. Taylor did CPR until medics arrived. We ran around looking for an AED, and they got ride of all the ones that were on the shop floor
Holy fuck. No I did not hear. He did tell me that he was going through something bad.
I dunno if anyone texted you, and I didn't see you at work, Len died at the crew meeting today. They did CPR for an hour and couldnt bring him back

You can also use two solid shims, glue them together with bms 5-36 per bac
The Bac1534-62F laminated shim is allowed for 487-634 per 141w0120#DL and sh 86. So laminated shims are fine

After hooking up those stands I realized I forgot some of my stuff in the drawer, and the fasteners Kevin asked me to grab, his ME8's and the collars. Anything you need before I head back down? Anything from the MIC? Fasteners from the drawer, countersinks? Let me know before break ends and I'll grab them
Cool thank you sir
Aaronâ€™s number +1 (425) 879-8117

Some reason Aaron and nicks numbers didn't transfer to my new phone, can you let them know I came back to the 27 to grab the fasteners I ordered and Kevin's Fasteners (The ME8's and the collars). Can you ask them if they need anything from the drawer while I'm down here
Yeah, I call in a few, just finishing getting ready. Its just a small strategy change
Shani's gone. Do you still need to talk?
The funding is there. You can fill us in in the morning. We don't want o slow the process.
I'll call around 9 tomorrow to go over everything.

Yes, but the prosecutor has put us in a bit of a time crunch, basically instead of doing one polygraph we want to do 2 with different providers. We have 2 who have availability this and next week, and she wants to call them tomorrow to get things moving. Just want to make sure the funding is there for two. Roughly about $700 each, will have exact costs after she talks to them
We will. We're just going to dinner with Shani. Can we talk in the morning? If so just call in the morning when you get up.
I talked with Ashley a bit more, nothing has really changed except strategy slightly. When you have some time give me a call and we can go over what we are thinking.
Ill send it now

I'm getting sick of this bs. Them not assigning me any work, saying they can't find anything for me to do, then on the 28th I had to go redo my seal recert because it mysteriously went away last week, then after I did it, I get an email at 11:05 saying I have been decertified again. I asked my manager why he decerited me, he said he did it earlier in the day. Why the fuck is he decerting me in the first place in a cert we use everyday

Hey man what's up just checking in with you

I can make myself available at 11:45am tomorrow if that works for you

Mr Davison, sir my name is Mickey Banks, I am with the FAA. I am trying to contact you regarding the hotline report you filed. I would like to set up an interview with you tomorrow January 29, 2026, between 10am and 12 pm PST. Please give me a call or respond to this text if that works for you. Thank you.
Just going to sleep. Will watch in morning. Night
There's nothing they can do. The parts do get here in time and the come loaded with NCR's and its not perfect they dont buy it
I screwed up one frame splice since I've been back last October, and they won't let me work on the plane. So fuck em

I know what your saying, but if your managers and leads won't help, there's really nothing else you can do except document your work and say fuck it. Get what pay you can and go home at the end if the day. Trust me, I'm pretty "done" also with the BS they are pulling with me
Its not about getting paid
Im done
Just remember, your paid by the hour. If some fucktards want to slow your shit down and your boss won't help, not your problem, you still getting paid
